original_image_tags: Reverse side of a typed document page. The page is aged, slightly discolored, with two hole-punch marks at the top. Faint, reversed text from the front side is visible through the paper. A handwritten signature or notation is present in the center. At the bottom, stamped text is visible.
Stamped text at the bottom of the page, appearing right-side up.

elements.description: Upside-down purple stamped text near the bottom margin reading 'TRANSMITTED' above 'DEC 13 3 53 PM '48'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions correctly identify a single, specific stamped text element as the primary visual content and do not contradict each other on its category or presence.
